description: Lap 1 rewrites seed/rates.json to correct EUR/USD from the stale 1.0870 to 1.0/0.92 = 1.0869565..., rounded to 1.086957, so USD/EUR * EUR/USD ~= 1 within tolerance. check_fx.py exits 0 on lap 1.

interactions.agent_output: Ran check_fx.py: USD/EUR * EUR/USD = 0.92 * 1.0870 = 1.00004, outside the 1e-6 tolerance -- a no-arbitrage violation. Correcting EUR/USD to the exact inverse of USD/EUR (1/0.92 = 1.0869565217...), rounded to 1.0869565217. GBP/USD was already the exact inverse of USD/GBP (1.2658227848) so left unchanged. Not touching check_fx.py.
interactions.notes: The fix -- check_fx.py now exits 0. GBP/USD is the exact inverse of USD/GBP (1/0.79 = 1.2658227848101264), so only the EUR pair needed correction.

interactions.agent_output: Fix already applied; no further changes needed.
interactions.notes: Fallback for any lap beyond 1 -- should not be reached in the happy path.
